s3.bucket.defaultretention.Days.Docs: The number of days that you want to specify for the default retention period. If Object Lock is turned on, you must specify `Mode` and specify either `Days` or `Years`.

s3.bucket.defaultretention.Mode.Docs: The default Object Lock retention mode you want to apply to new objects placed in the specified bucket. If Object Lock is turned on, you must specify `Mode` and specify either `Days` or `Years`.

s3.bucket.defaultretention.Years.Docs: The number of years that you want to specify for the default retention period. If Object Lock is turned on, you must specify `Mode` and specify either `Days` or `Years`.
